reasoning: OpenAI has not announced the creation of AGI as of early November 2025. In fact, their October 2025 restructuring deal with Microsoft introduced a new contractual provision that requires any official declaration of AGI by OpenAI to be verified by an independent expert panel. This adds significant bureaucratic friction and effectively removes the ability for Sam Altman or OpenAI to make unilateral, surprise declarations of AGI. Furthermore, Altman recently commented that the term 'AGI' has become 'hugely overloaded', suggesting a shift in messaging away from the buzzword. Given the financial and legal implications of declaring AGI under the new Microsoft partnership structure, combined with the lack of an active verification panel process reported by the November 2025 cutoff, it is highly unlikely OpenAI will declare it by December 31, 2025.
